title: BEM-866 dispatch failed reason
objective:
Run script:
"""
result = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
text = result.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if result.exists() else ''
low = text.lower()
if not result.exists():
    status = 'RESULT_MISSING'
elif 'not found' in low or '404' in low:
    status = 'WORKFLOW_NOT_FOUND'
elif 'permissions' in low or '403' in low or 'resource not accessible' in low:
    status = 'PERMISSION_DENIED'
elif 'inputs' in low and ('unexpected' in low or 'invalid' in low):
    status = 'INVALID_INPUTS'
elif 'ref' in low and ('not found' in low or 'invalid' in low):
    status = 'INVALID_REF'
elif 'dispatch_failed' in low:
    status = 'DISPATCH_FAILED_UNKNOWN'
elif 'dispatched' in low:
    status = 'DISPATCHED'
else:
    status = 'UNKNOWN'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_DISPATCH_FAILED_REASON_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 dispatch failed reason\nStatus: ' + status + '\nResult exists: ' + str(result.exists()) + '\n\nResult text:\n' + text[:3000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('dispatch failed reason: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
